name: Abilene Golf Studio WTX
about: Abilene Golf Studio WTX is an indoor golf facility featuring multiple simulator bays for year-round play. The venue combines high-tech golf simulation with a full bar and grill, catering to both serious golf practice and social outings. They offer a range of services including league play, corporate events, mobile simulator rentals, and membership packages for regular users.
why_golfers_like_it: Indoor golf experience available year-round regardless of weather
Full bar and grill on-site for food and drinks during play
Mobile simulator options available for off-site events
Multiple league and tournament opportunities for competitive play

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen and food menu available

simulator_hardware.notes: Mobile Swing EZ simulators mentioned; specific studio hardware not detailed

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not specify whether they provide club rentals, so it's recommended to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted as the venue has its own full bar and grill available for customers.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the average time for an 18-hole round, but simulator play times can typically range from 2-3 hours depending on the number of players.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Abilene Golf Studio is explicitly described as a family-friendly facility where everyone can join in the fun.
